item.title: MyAG：用于设计和分析可组合 LLM 代理系统的基于图形的框架
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13474v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present MyAG, a graph-based framework for designing and analyzing composable LLM agent systems. Our framework separates agent system construction into three graph abstractions: a component graph for agents, environments, and modules; a workflow graph for execution cont
